use rayon::prelude::*;
use std::sync::Arc;

struct LargeState {
    data: Vec<u8>,
    index: HashMap<u64, Vec<usize>>,
    config: Config,
}

// GOOD: borrow or share via cheap handles
fn process_batch(state: &LargeState, items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    items.par_iter()
        .map(|item| {
            let result = state.lookup(item.key);
            transform(result)
        })
        .collect()
}

fn analyze_chunks(text: &str, chunks: &[Range<usize>]) -> Vec<Analysis> {
    chunks.par_iter()
        .map(|range| {
            let slice = &text[range.clone()];
            analyze(slice)
        })
        .collect()
}
